new_terms.context: NVIDIA's latest GPU architecture following Hopper.
An iterative update to the Blackwell GPU architecture.
A data structure used by NVIDIA's Tensor Memory Accelerator (TMA) to define multi-dimensional layouts.
The kernel programming language/model for Google TPUs.
AWS's low-level programming interface for Trainium and Inferentia accelerators.
AMD's next-generation data center GPU architecture.
A specific technical project or tool mentioned for low-level benchmarking.
